## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the happy path and at least one failure mode.
- [ ] `make lint typecheck test` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] `docs/TOOLS.md` updated if a tool was added or changed.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Target branch is `develop` (or `main` only for release/hotfix).
